aeus:0)I218:1.5699238777160645,Cercopithecus_neglectus:0)I219:1.0585823059082031,(((Mandrillus_leucophaeus:0,Cercocebus_atys:0)I220:0.26025697588920593,Papio_anubis:0)I221:0.49655434489250183,(Macaca_nemestrina:0,(Macaca_fascicularis:0,Macaca_mulatta:0)I222:0.4760373830795288)I223:2.242354393005371)I224:1.3072797060012817)I225:1.8292324542999268)I226:3.6582374572753906,(Nomascus_leucogenys:0,(Pongo_abelii:0,(Gorilla_gorilla:0,((Pan_troglodytes:0,Pan_paniscus:0)I227:2.5348570346832275,Homo_sapiens:0)I228:0.4927920699119568)I229:1.865248680114746)I230:0.52642422914505)I231:1.6190555095672607)I232:1.626216173171997)I233:1.667646884918213)I234:1.6097674369812012)I235:0.2361818104982376)I236:0.1284276396036148)I237:1.6218284368515015)I238:1e-06)I239:1e-06;
